features.name: Cloud Task Table (Supabase) — actp_cloud_tasks with indexes
Cloud Task Poller (Local) — cloud_task_poller.py in actp-worker
Result Uploader — post task results back to Supabase + optional callback
Local Health Reporter — extend heartbeat_agent.py with full service health
Realtime Subscriptions — Supabase Realtime for local → cloud push
Cloud → Local Webhook Endpoint — POST /api/cloud/trigger on :8765
Data Export API — DataBridge class for cloud data access
Task Priority Queue RPC — claim_cloud_task() Supabase function
BrowserAgentRegistry — actp_browser_agents table + registration API
UnifiedBrowserCommand API — POST /api/browser/command dispatch router
Safari Agent Template — apply Instagram patterns to all Safari services
Chrome Agent for LinkedIn — packages/linkedin-chrome with Playwright
Upwork Safari Agent — extend port 3108 with job search actions
Cloud Command Receiver — ACTP worker polls actp_browser_tasks
Result Uploader — browser action results → Supabase + Storage
Platform Action Matrix — integration tests across all 6 platforms
Keyword → Creator Pipeline — use Market Research API (3106) for all platforms
Creator Follower Extractor — extract_followers browser action per platform
LinkedIn Prospect Strategy — Chrome agent ICP search + post engagers
Unified Prospect Table — actp_prospects Supabase table with deduplication
Prospect Scorer — platform-specific scoring models (0-100 scale)
CRM Feed — push prospects with score ≥ 65 to CRMLite
Acquisition Schedule (Cron) — daily prospect sweeps per platform
Prospect Intelligence Loop — conversion feedback → scorer weight adjustment
Upwork Job Scanner — Safari action search_jobs with filter criteria
Job Feasibility Scorer — Claude Haiku reviews job feasibility
Autonomous Build Agent — agent_swarm.py builds project on Passport drive
GitHub Push — create private repo + push project code
Vercel Deploy — deploy to Vercel + verify preview URL
Passport Drive Backup — save project to /Volumes/My Passport/client-projects/
Telegram Approval Gate — inline keyboard for human approval
Proposal Sender — Claude generates proposal + Safari submits
Pipeline Cron — job scan (4h), build queue (1h), proposal check (daily)
Won Job Workflow — deliver files + archive to Passport drive
Failure Detection Bus — emit_failure() helper + actp_failure_events table
Failure Classifier — Claude Haiku classifies failure types
Claude Code Repair Agent — spawn repair session via claude_launcher.py
Docker Sandbox Testing — test fixes in throwaway containers
Auto-Deploy Fixed Code — apply fix + restart service + commit to GitHub
Escalation Protocol — 4-tier escalation ending in Telegram alert
Long-Horizon Coding via GitHub Scaffolding — branch + PR workflow
Skill Library (Reusable Fix Patterns) — actp_heal_patterns table
Self-Healing Dashboard — add to autonomous.html with live failure feed
